mapper.select: SELECT session_id, user_id, dept_id, title, message_count, last_message_time, create_time FROM kb_qa_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_message_time DESC, session_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_qa_session (user_id, dept_id, title, message_count, last_message_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deptId}, #{title}, #{messageCount}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createTime})
